title: The Ugly Duckling
writer: Sid Colin, Jack Davies, Robert Louis Stevenson
actors: Bernard Bresslaw, Reginald Beckwith, Jon Pertwee
plot: Henry Jeckle was always the outsider, a bungling and awkward buffoon, relegated to waiting for his invitation to participate in life that never arrived: until he discovers a medical formula developed by a dead uncle, which claimed...
